name: Ubuntu25.04 with GCC15
postStartCommand: (conan profile detect || true) && mkdir -p build-debug build-release && cd build-debug && conan build -b missing -s build_type=Debug .. && cd ../build-release && conan build -b missing -s build_type=Release .. && echo '=== Running Tests ===' && cd ../build-debug && ctest --debug && cd ../build-release && ctest --debug
